text:
Frequently Asked Questions for FreeBSD 6.X, 7.X and 8.X
Chapter 3 Installation
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/faq/install.html

Floppy bootable install images support has been dropped as of 8.0.

Remove all FAQ questions and answers that make reference to floppy installs
